sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Qualcomm, Tata Electronics Join Hands To Manufacture Automotive Modules In India
feed.summary: Qualcomm Technologies and Tata Electronics have announced a collaboration to manufacture Qualcomm Automotive Modules in India. Tata Electronics will use its new OSAT facility in Jagiroad, Assam, to produce technologies for digital cockpits, infotainment, connectivity, and intelligent vehicle systems. This partnership supports the "Make in India" initiative and aims to enhance supply chain diversification for both Indian and global automakers.

feed.title: Fair Isaac (FICO) Stock Is Quietly Ripping—But Should You Chase It?
feed.summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) has seen its stock perform exceptionally well due to its entrenched position in the US credit system, providing essential credit scoring and decisioning software to major lenders. The company is viewed as a "hidden in plain sight" giant, benefiting from recurring software revenue, its role in AI and risk management, and pricing power in its scoring models. While analysts acknowledge its strong fundamentals and market dominance, some express caution regarding its valuation after significant rallies.

feed.title: 11 Best New Five Below Easter Finds Hitting Shelves This Week
feed.summary: Five Below is offering a variety of new Easter-themed items, with prices starting as low as $1. The selection includes Easter baskets, grass fillers, decorative items like bunny pillows and flocked figurines, as well as craft kits and candy-filled eggs. These affordable finds are ideal for Easter basket preparations and spring holiday decorations.

feed.title: 3 Underrated Amex Platinum Perks Frequent Travelers Should Know About
feed.summary: This article highlights three often-overlooked benefits of the American Express Platinum Card that are valuable for frequent travelers, despite its high $895 annual fee. These perks include $320 in annual Uber credits (Uber One membership and Uber Cash), a $209 annual CLEAR+ credit for expedited airport security, and $200 in annual airline fee credits. The author emphasizes that these benefits, when utilized, can significantly offset the card's annual cost and enhance the travel experience.

feed.title: Best Solana ETFs for 2026: Compare Fees, Staking Rewards & Promos
feed.summary: This article provides a comparison of the top Solana ETFs available in 2026, including their fees, staking rewards, and promotional offers. It highlights options like Franklin Solana ETF (SOEZ) for low fees, Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL) for staking rewards, and Fidelity Solana Fund (FSOL) for brand trust and fee waivers. The piece emphasizes the importance of considering long-term expense ratios, staking features, and promotional offer durations when choosing an ETF.

feed.title: Equinor ASA Is Quietly Shifting US Energy – Should You Care?
feed.summary: Equinor ASA, a Norwegian energy giant, is making significant, under-the-radar moves in US offshore wind, gas exports, and low-carbon technologies, while using its traditional oil and gas revenues to fund these transitions. The company's strategy is appealing to investors seeking both current profits from fossil fuels and future growth in renewables, particularly given its direct impact on US energy prices and its accessibility to US investors through the NYSE. Despite its hybrid approach, Equinor presents a balanced option for those looking for energy security and transition exposure, coupled with inherent volatility due to commodity prices and regulatory risks.

feed.title: Hercules Capital Plunges as Investors Flee SaaS Exposure
feed.summary: Hercules Capital (HTGC), a business development company (BDC), has experienced a stock price decline due to investor concerns over its exposure to the struggling software-as-a-service (SaaS) sector and its 10% payment-in-kind (PIK) loan portfolio. Analysts view PIK loans as a sign of potential financial distress for borrowers, indicating heightened credit risks for Hercules Capital despite its reputation as a high-quality BDC. Investors are closely watching the company's ability to manage these challenges and its upcoming earnings report.

feed.title: Should You Buy Oracle Stock Right Now?
feed.summary: Oracle's cloud infrastructure (OCI) revenue is growing significantly, driven by massive AI contracts, but the company is taking on substantial debt and selling profitable units to fund its data center expansion. The article raises concerns about Oracle's reliance on OpenAI, whose financial stability is questioned, and advises against investing in Oracle stock at this time.

feed.title: Wipro Stock: Quiet Rally, Big Question for US Tech Investors
feed.summary: Wipro Ltd's US-listed shares (ADRs) have seen a quiet rally driven by stronger IT services demand and cost discipline, yet they still trade at a discount compared to many US tech peers. For US investors, Wipro acts as a leveraged play on US tech spending with an emerging-markets overlay, offering a way to diversify tech exposure at a potentially lower price point. The company's performance is closely tied to global enterprise tech spending cycles and India's structural growth, making it a satellite tech holding for US-centric portfolios.
